display_text: Luna Aghanim's Scepter: Allows Eclipse to be cast on an allied unit or area, doubling beam speed and removing beam limits. This upgrade drastically improves anti-split-push and teamfight potential, enabling Luna to dominate key areas or protect allies during critical engagements.
search_text: Luna Aghanim Scepter Eclipse anti-split-push teamfight area control beam speed

display_text: Luna Aghanim's Shard: Increases Glaives' collision damage and rotation speed. This upgrade enhances Luna's anti-physical damage and farming efficiency, allowing her to clear waves and jungle camps faster while maintaining strong dueling potential against tanky heroes.
search_text: Luna Aghanim Shard Glaives anti-physical damage farming efficiency dueling potential
